title: 4-letter words sprint
description: Speed sprint on the most common 4-letter words
text: that with this have from they been more them what some when than time only know also will many like into back over make most well take year

tips.text: These short words carry every sentence you will ever write. Get them clean and the rest follows.
Treat 'th' as one move, not two. Your hands already know the shape; let them.

tips.target: that with this have from they been more them what some when than time

tips.text: Read a word or two ahead of your cursor. A good copy editor never types blind; the eyes lead, the hands keep up.

tips.target: only know also will many like into back over make most well take year

character_tips.anna: Reading ahead is the whole trick. Teach your eyes to scan forward and the speed comes on its own. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.maxim: These are the load-bearing words. Drill them until they cost you nothing. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.knopych: Four letters, four quiet taps, even rhythm. No flourish. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.klavochka: Let them roll one into the next, steady as a tide. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
